rule_metadata.name: truncate
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'truncate' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule truncate
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'truncate' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "truncate"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "truncate -s 0 /var/log/messages"
		$string2 = "truncate --size=0 /var/log/security"

	condition:
		any of them
}
